# Product Guide

## Returns

Customers can request a refund within 30 calendar days of purchase.
Refunds are processed back to the original payment method within 5 business days after approval.

## Support

Priority support is available from Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Nepal Time.
Bug reports marked as severity one are reviewed within 2 hours during support hours.

## Integrations

The analytics connector exports data every 15 minutes.
Administrators can trigger a manual sync from the integrations dashboard.
